name: @choksheak/vitest-run
description: A drop-in Vitest CLI that removes the includes restriction and allows the user to run any test file from the CLI.
author: ChokSheak Lau

scripts.pkg: mkdir -p dist && cp -f package.json LICENSE README.md dist
scripts.release: npm run clean && bump-version && npm i && npm run tsc && npm run build && npm run pkg && npm run pub && npm run commit
